text_block_list.text:
The day of Seiun Sky's debut has finally arrived.
However...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Naaah, of course I'm not... I was just closing my
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll wear myself out if I'm firing on all cylinders
from the get-go.
choice_data_list:
So you'll hit the race with everything you've
got?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Like the wind blows whichever way it wants, so
too will I. You'll just have to wait and see.
